ShortDescription.Value: Automatically demolishes abandoned, condemned, and destroyed buildings.

Publish.LongDescription:
# Auto Bulldozer
Tired of manually clearing abandoned buildings? This mod does it for you.
## Features - Automatically demolishes **abandoned** buildings (on by default) - Optionally demolishes **condemned** buildings - Optionally clears **destroyed** zoned buildings (fire/disaster rubble) — the game regrows them, and service/placed buildings are never touched - Master on/off switch and per-category toggles in Options → Mods → Auto Bulldozer - **Grace period**: optionally wait N in-game days before demolishing abandoned buildings, giving them a chance to be re-occupied - **Adjustable sweep frequency** (1–64 scans per in-game day) - Session statistics per category, with a reset button - Lightweight: scans a few times per in-game day, no per-frame cost
## Notes - Demolition uses the game's own deletion pipeline, so it's save-safe - Safe to add or remove from a save at any time - Source Code can be found on [GitHub](https://github.com/ryangils/AutoBulldozer) - Any complaints please post them on the [forum](https://forum.paradoxplaza.com/forum/threads/auto-bulldozer-beta-issues-complaints-can-be-posted-here.1934999/) or [Discord](https://discord.gg/HTav7ARPs2)
Publish.ChangeLog: "Clear destroyed buildings" now only clears zoned growables (which the game regrows) and never touches service buildings, signature buildings or anything you placed by hand — so you can no longer lose a service to it.
